codeReview.summary: The dispatch module creates the initial run cohort from accepted variants, respects the per-study concurrency cap, and uses Workpool completion hooks to refill slots as dispatch jobs finish. I did not find a standalone correctness issue in this feature.

summary: Reviewed the handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit `aab4cd803ebba8ec80506ba884f20a679b9bbcf9` for `wave-dispatch`. The initial cohort creation and dispatch/refill flow are coherent and I found no code defects in this feature.
